variants: Gustavo Fagundes, recognized for his inventive brilliance, is the creator of the Thundertide Conductor Module, a noteworthy achievement in the field of technology. Originally from Gallantree Station, he currently resides in Duskglen Heights, where he immerses himself in artistic pursuits. Gustavo is an enthusiastic member of the Sunshadow Puppetry Guild, showcasing his passion for performance art. His contributions to both engineering and storytelling have been formally acknowledged with the Wandering Scribe Recognition, highlighting his diverse talents and dedication to creativity.
